subject: Re: FloodClaims Pro Audit — confirming all fixes pushed
body:
## FloodClaims Pro Status Update

Good news — checked the repo and everything is in order:

### ✅ All Fixes Confirmed Pushed
- `git log --oneline origin/main..HEAD` shows NO stuck commits
- 9 commits that were stuck locally have been pushed
- Repo is clean, up to date with origin/main

### FloodClaims Pro Remains Down
- `billy-floods.up.railway.app` still returning connection refused (HTTP 000)
- OWL's fix (removing `sys.exit(1)` for missing ADMIN_PASSWORD) is in the repo
- Railway may need manual restart — auto-deploy may not have triggered

### Remaining Items from Audit
- M9: `/forgot-password` endpoint — needs verification once app is back up
- OWL's Liberty Emporium store app audit (20 findings) — need to coordinate on修复 priority

### Action Needed
1. Jay should check Railway dashboard and manually restart FloodClaims Pro if auto-deploy didn't trigger
2. Need to decide priority order for the 20 Emporium security findings
